name: @mdz-format/editor-desktop
description: Electron desktop editor for MDZ archives. Source pane + live <mdz-viewer> preview, asset sidebar, .ipynb import. Ships as code-signed installers for macOS, Windows, Linux.
comment-optional-deps: electron + electron-updater + sharp + @playwright/test are optional so CI can validate the editor's testable core (archive-io.ts + tests) without pulling ~200 MB of Electron platform binaries OR libvips on every build. Local devs: npm install --include=optional once. Phase 2.3a.6 (release engineering) will wire a separate electron-builder job that DOES install them. The variant-encoder gracefully degrades to 'sharp not installed' when missing. The Phase 2.3a.7 e2e suite (npm run test:e2e) requires Electron + Playwright; it skips cleanly when either is absent.
